table-580-580.caption: Write all comments made on the post titled 'How does gentle boosting differ from AdaBoost?'
data: Explains how Gentle Boosting uses least squares instead of exponential loss for regression tasks.
Notes that Gentle Boost is more robust against outliers compared to standard AdaBoost in noisy datasets.
Asks whether the convergence rate differs significantly between the two algorithms when applied to high-dimensional features.
Clarifies that while both use weak learners, Gentle Boost updates predictions by adding half-steps rather than full steps.
